---
title: "Brady Earley"
---

### Empirical Evidence | Public Law

![](Earley_Brady.jpg){width=250}

## Current Projects
- Testing citizen perceptions of coercion in the context of religion in public schools
- Studying the inherent empiricism of the Supreme Court's use of strict scrutiny

## Links

- [GitHub](https://github.com/bradyearley)
- [LinkedIn](https://linkedin.com/in/brady-earley/)
